economic_notes: Nation has six business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including Coast Salish Development Corporation, Thuy'she'num Property Management LP, Deer Point Developments LP, Ivy Green Petroleum LP, Thuthiqut Resources LP, and Thuy'she'num Investments LP. COVID-19 noted as significant event impacting operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Three entities fully consolidated: Stu'ate Lelum Secondary School and Chemainus Native College, CMHC Social Housing Program, and 1089106 B.C. Ltd. Six GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. GBE year-end is December 31, 2020 (different from Nation's March 31 year-end). COVID-19 noted as significant event. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($11,283,408) + FNHA ($2,036,482) + FNESC ($1,486,172) + Province of BC ($853,192) + CMHC ($163,181) + Coast Salish Employment and Training Society ($411,260) = $16,233,695 (CSEAT may be a transfer organization). OSR includes earnings from business entities ($2,145,897), gaming revenue ($610,407), rental income ($382,075), other revenue ($1,930,849), and ISC trust fund interest ($4,632). No remuneration schedule visible in extracted text. Distribution to members of $240,207 recorded.
